user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Apple
Product type: AirPods Pro wireless earbuds
Tone: innovative, premium, minimalist
Visual style: Clean, sleek visuals with a focus on white space and product close-ups that emphasize modernity and sophistication.
Conceptual technique: lifestyle aspiration storytelling
Format: image

brief.visual_style: Clean, sleek visuals with a focus on white space and product close-ups that emphasize modernity and sophistication.
brief.headline: Elevate Every Moment.
brief.subheadline: AirPods Pro. Immersive sound. Effortless style.
brief.body_copy: Experience unparalleled noise cancellation and crisp, rich audio with the AirPods Pro. Designed to fit your life seamlessly, they bring innovation and elegance to every beat.

visual_direction.background: Pristine white with ample negative space
visual_direction.product_placement: Close-up of AirPods Pro with subtle reflections highlighting their sleek contours
visual_direction.lifestyle_element: A faint, soft-focus silhouette of a person in a modern urban setting, suggesting aspiration and active lifestyle without detracting from the product
visual_direction.color_palette: Predominantly white and silver, with subtle shadows to create depth
visual_direction.typography: San Francisco font, light weight, spaced lettering to emphasize minimalism
visual_direction.composition: Center the product slightly off-center to the right, headline above and call to action below in balanced alignment
visual_direction.lighting: Soft, diffused lighting to enhance the product’s premium finish
visual_direction.imagery_style: Photography with minimal retouching to keep it authentic yet refined
